name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_reference_table
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeReferenceTable materializes compact export-disabled surface-wake reference rows for downstream review.
note: Primary compact reference table shape.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_reference_handoff
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeReferenceHandoff gates whether reference rows may be exported.
note: Reference export gate.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_error_budget
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeErrorBudget supplies per preset surface and clearance aggregate pressure velocity and arrival diagnostics.
note: Aggregate diagnostic source.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_acceptance_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeAcceptanceGate supplies lab-validation acceptance before any reference export.
note: Lab acceptance source.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_result_seed
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeResultSeed supplies rotor-level evidence that feeds the aggregate rows.
note: Rotor evidence source.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future live transient powered-hover surface-wake validation evidence.
note: Upstream CFD target for live evidence.
